name: Thought Industries Customer Learning Platform API
what_it_does: Thought Industries enterprise customer education and extended enterprise learning platform REST API for monetized learning, partner training, and customer onboarding programs. Enables AI agents to manage course catalog creation and learner enrollment for customer education automation, handle e-commerce and course purchase workflows for learning monetization automation, access learner progress and certification tracking for customer success integration, retrieve group and team management for B2B partner training automation, manage custom learning portal and white-label configuration for multi-tenant customer education, handle subscription and learning plan management for recurring customer education programs, access webhook-driven completion events for downstream CRM and CS platform integration, retrieve assessment and quiz management for certification program automation, manage content localization and multi-language delivery for global customer education, and integrate Thought Industries with Salesforce, HubSpot, Gainsight, and Stripe for full customer education lifecycle.
use_cases: Onboarding customers from CS automation agents
Certifying partners from partner enablement agents
Monetizing courses from learning commerce agents
Tracking customer education from CRM integration agents
not_for: Internal employee HR compliance training (use Cornerstone or Workday Learning)
best_when: A SaaS company, technology vendor, or B2B organization wanting AI agents to automate customer onboarding education, partner certification, and monetized learning program management within Thought Industries as the extended enterprise LMS.
avoid_when: STRIPE PAYMENT INTEGRATION FOR COURSE E-COMMERCE: Automated course purchase workflows via Thought Industries e-commerce require PCI-DSS compliant payment handling; automated payment collection without Stripe tokenization or PCI-safe checkout flow creates PCI-DSS scope exposure. CERTIFICATION EXPIRY FOR COMPLIANCE-CRITICAL PARTNER PROGRAMS: Automated partner certification tracking must handle certification expiry and re-certification workflow; automated partner access without expired certification enforcement creates partner compliance gap and vendor partner program liability. GDPR LEARNER DATA FOR EU CUSTOMER EDUCATION: Automated customer education data including completion, assessment scores, and progress for EU learners requires GDPR-compliant data processing agreements; automated learner data sharing with CRM without data processing agreement creates GDPR violation.

auth.notes: Thought Industries uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST and GraphQL APIs with JSON. Boston, Massachusetts HQ. Founded 2014. Private (Susquehanna Growth Equity, Volition Capital investors). 300+ enterprise customers. Extended enterprise LXP for customer and partner education. Learning commerce with Stripe integration. White-label multi-tenant portals. Competes with Skilljar, LearnUpon, and Docebo for customer education platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription based on learner volume and portal count
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by active learner volume; multi-portal and white-label add-ons; e-commerce and Stripe integration included
pricing.notes: Boston MA. Private (Susquehanna Growth Equity, Volition Capital). Founded 2014. 300+ enterprise customers. Customer and partner education LXP. Annual subscription by learner volume.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; GraphQL query depth limits; webhooks for completion, purchase, and enrollment events

known_agent_gotchas: GRAPHQL QUERY DEPTH LIMIT FOR COMPLEX LEARNING DATA: Thought Industries GraphQL API enforces query depth limits; automated agents building complex nested queries for learner progress, certification, and enrollment data may hit depth limits; flatten queries and use multiple requests for deep data retrieval

CERTIFICATION EXPIRY ENFORCEMENT FOR PARTNER PROGRAMS: Automated partner portal access must check certification expiry date before granting partner resource access; automated partner enablement without expiry-based access revocation creates partner program compliance gap

MULTI-PORTAL TENANT ISOLATION: Thought Industries multi-tenant portal architecture requires API credentials scoped to specific portal; automated workflows spanning multiple customer portals must use portal-specific API keys; cross-portal queries are not supported with single credential set

Stripe payment webhook idempotency for course purchases — automated course purchase fulfillment via Stripe webhook must handle duplicate webhook delivery; implement idempotency key on Stripe payment_intent to prevent duplicate enrollment on payment webhook retry

GDPR learner erasure across portal tenants — automated GDPR erasure request for EU learner must propagate across all portal tenants the learner accessed; Thought Industries multi-portal architecture may require separate erasure per portal API credential; implement erasure workflow for all learner-associated portals

CRM integration completion event latency — Thought Industries webhook delivery for course completion may have seconds-to-minutes latency; automated Salesforce/Gainsight CS update triggered by completion webhook must handle eventual consistency; do not assume real-time CRM sync for time-sensitive customer success workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer education LXP. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth. US/EU. Learner progress, certification, and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer education. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth. US/EU. Learner, certification, and e-commerce data.
